scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@mindpulse/shared && npm run build --workspace=@mindpulse/web
scripts.deploy: npm run build --workspace=@mindpulse/shared && npm run deploy --workspace=@mindpulse/web
scripts.preview:cloudflare: npm run build --workspace=@mindpulse/shared && npm run preview --workspace=@mindpulse/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@mindpulse/shared && npm run test --workspace=@mindpulse/web
